response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, staff-level software engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js credentials and genuinely relevant MCP and agentic workflow work in his current role. However, the role demands 8+ years of production AI solution delivery, and his AI/GenAI exposure is limited to a single role that started just one month ago (April 2025). Python — one of the two primary required languages — does not appear anywhere in his skills. Vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation pipelines are entirely absent from the resume, leaving critical gaps across the core technical requirements. His general engineering depth is real, but the AI-specific experience profile does not meet the bar for a Staff-level forward-deployed GenAI engineer.
strengths: Consistent Staff-level individual contributor track record across multiple companies, including customer-facing and consulting contexts (Altom, re:cinq)
Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generator and agentic workflow infrastructure work at re:cinq — directly aligned with a key technology in the JD
Strong distributed-systems and data-pipeline background from Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/sec, async I/O, high-performance databases)
concerns: GenAI/AI-system experience is effectively limited to ~1 month in current role — far below the 8-year minimum required for the position
Python is absent from the skills section despite being one of the two primary languages explicitly required by the JD
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or optimization techniques anywhere in the resume
